title: Wavlud Manuscript
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:WavludHeadshot.jpg|thumb|The author, [[Ingo Wavlud]]]]
The '''Wavlud Manuscript''' was written by [[Ingo Wavlud]], a suspected [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] sympathizer. It detailed historical information pertaining to the Sith.

==Content==
The Manuscript contained specific information regarding the [[Darth/Legends|''Darth'']] honorific and [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], information unknown to [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi historian|historians]] up until recovering it from Wavlud's personal effects.<ref name="TEGTTF">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>

==History==
The manuscript came in the possession of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] [[Council on Security and Intelligence]], where it was translated by agent [[Gannod Chant]] by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. [[Tionne Solusar]] used it for her [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force|records about the Jedi and the Sith]].<ref name="TEGTTF" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2007-11-27 -->[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]
